quizQuestion:
今年は去年{___}、雨の量が多い。
(This year, compared to last year, the quantity of rain is much more.)
pedagogicalNote: ほど = to the extent that / not as~as~; より = than/rather than; に比べて = compared to; くらい/ぐらい = about/approximately/to the extent; 比べものにならない = no comparison possible
